headline: This Check Point Software Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Wednesday
summary: Analysts changed outlook on top Wall Street names. Check ratings page for upgrades, downgrades, and initiations. See what they think of AIG, CHKP, AON, ALL, and THG.

headline: Piper Sandler Downgrades Aon to Neutral, Raises Price Target to $377
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   downgrades Aon (NYSE:AON) from Overweight to Neutral and raises the price target from $355 to $377.
